reviews.review_description:
Why make this when nothing works.
Cannot pick up containers,
cannot move fork-lift for port tour.
Crane moves only.
This is the year 2025 for goodness sake.

This sts simulator is really just a frustrating waste of time. If you’re an operator thinking this will help you…NO! This ain’t it! There are no lines on the spreader, no swing to catch. There is no way to change your spreader from 20’s to 40’s and vice versa that I could find anyway.

Nothing in the cab works. Your hands aren’t even on the controls themselves…they kinda float. No instructions on how to use/move/pickup/ drop down anything. Pretty much trial and error 🙄

I think this could be great if more time and effort is actually put into it. No flippers to put up or down smh. No cells on the ship. (I’veonly gotten to level 5, but don’t really wanna go any further based on what I’ve seen 😫) Just like random boxes…y’all need like 5 more updates to get some traction I think. I really wanted to love bc I’d like to use it work but it needs to be full functioning. Ok, so there are lines but still no swing

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We’re sorry to hear that your experience wasn’t up to expectations. Your observations about spreader functionality, cab controls, and game mechanics are valuable to us. Our goal is to create an engaging and realistic simulation, and your input highlights areas we need to improve.

We’re currently working on updates to enhance functionality. If you have more suggestions, references, or ideas you’d like to see implemented, please feel free to share them with us at info@tulipapps.com. Your input helps us make the game better for everyone!

reviews.review_title: Spreader doesn't close to pick up 20ft.

reviews.review_description:
Pause menu is floating, your cursor goes through it, complete guesswork if you can use the options.


As for the controls themselves, the entire cab is non functional, no joysticks work, the camera is just a 3rd person view tacked on, the only controls used are A & B to move the crane forward and back, X & Y to move the head up and down, there is no physics at all, nothing swings or sways, the grab is completely non-functional, overall, in it's current state, it's completely terrible.
